responseMessageContents.text:
The user said "My app is expo go with w" — this seems like an incomplete message, possibly cut off. They're saying their app is Expo Go with... something. Maybe they were going to say "with watchman" or some other detail.

But more importantly, the system context is trying to tell me this is a "NEW empty project" — that's incorrect. This is the IVX Holdings workspace with 402+ commits, live production, and a Gradle APK build I just restarted. I will NOT
